mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_record (user_id, title, content, biz_id, read_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{record.userId}, #{record.title}, #{record.content}, #{record.bizId}, #{record.readStatus}, #{record.createTime}, #{record.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_record SET title = #{record.title}, content = #{record.content}, biz_id = #{record.bizId}, read_status = #{record.readStatus}, update_time = #{record.updateTime} WHERE id = #{record.id}
